objective: Hide Profile, TJM, Suivi (Applications), and CV tabs behind a premium feature flag. These tabs are for paid features that previously required authentication/payment.

content: Hide 4 tabs (profile, tjm, applications, cv) behind isPremium local flag
reason: User wants these paid features behind paywall

content: Use local chrome.storage to track isPremium status (no auth needed)
reason: No authentication exists anymore, premium status is local only
